title: Older Brother as Anchor
html: Stub. The role Yahir has built around emilio — being the deliberate anchor figure his younger brother can navigate by, including embodying courage/resiliency "even if these traits felt, at times, counterfeit". First named in the FORD/JCEF essays; productized into the sealed letters series.
